title: Ceramic Blue Glaze
description: Premium ceramic tile with rich blue glaze finish. Ideal for kitchen backsplashes, bathroom walls, and feature walls. Non-slip matte surface with high durability rating for both indoor and outdoor use.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Venetian Marble
description: Elegant marble-effect tile with natural vein patterns. Perfect for luxury bathrooms, foyers, and accent walls. Polished finish adds brightness to any space.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Forest Mosaic
description: Hand-crafted mosaic tile inspired by forest tones. Great for feature walls, pool areas, and outdoor patios. Water-resistant and frost-proof.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Ivory Diamond
description: Classic diamond-pattern porcelain tile in warm ivory tones. Timeless design suitable for floors, walls, and commercial spaces.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Midnight Medallion
description: Deep navy ceramic tile with metallic medallion pattern. Stunning for feature walls and luxury bathroom floors.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Sahara Brick
description: Warm terracotta brick-style tile bringing earthy Mediterranean charm. Ideal for kitchens, patios, and rustic interiors.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Arctic White
description: Pure white large-format porcelain tile for a clean minimalist look. Perfect for open-plan interiors and modern bathrooms.
creator: TileHaus Studio

title: Obsidian Slate
description: Handmade Moroccan-style zellige tile in obsidian black with natural imperfections for authentic artisan look.
creator: TileHaus Studio
